metadata.description: Projected costs are used for elite selection at every Cube CEM iteration. Each projected-CEM final pool is simulator-scored for all candidates and saved as a .pt file.

axis_definitions.displacement_m: Euclidean distance between privileged_block_0_pos at goal and start, in meters.
axis_definitions.yaw_delta_rad: Wrapped absolute privileged_block_0_yaw delta, recorded for interpretability only.

cube_pair_metadata.valid_start_rule: step_idx <= ep_len - offset - 1 and goal_row remains in the same ep_idx

projection_config.fixed_scope: one matrix per (m, projection_seed), reused across all pairs and CEM iterations

endpoint_metric_pool.source: loaded from cube_stage1b.json records for matching (pair, m, projection_seed)

projection_matrix.fixed_scope: fixed per (dimension, projection_seed) across pairs and CEM iterations
